isolation.mode: read-only validation (navigation, inspection, hover, screenshots only)

assertions.title: Status indicators are 6x6 squares

steps.action: Open /WEA/agents/all and inspect agent status indicator
steps.expected: Observe 6x6 square indicators for alive/error/idle statuses
steps.observed: Observed idle indicator only; width 6px, height 6px, border-radius 0px, transparent background with 1px border

steps.action: Audit computed styles and design tokens
steps.expected: Verify alive/error/idle indicator instances and colors
steps.observed: Alive/dead CSS vars exist (#82E88A/#FF6060), but no alive/error indicator instances rendered in seeded data

assertions.issues: Blocked by fixture coverage: no alive/error indicator instances available to validate full semantic-color requirement.

steps.action: Inspect Import company, Export company (/WEA/org), and New Agent (/WEA/agents/all) buttons
steps.expected: Transparent bg, 1px border, JetBrains Mono 11px uppercase, no radius
steps.observed: All three buttons use transparent background, 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.32) border, JetBrains Mono 11px, uppercase, and 0px radius

assertions.title: Agent sorting within tier columns

steps.expected: Order should be active/running first, then waiting, then idle/completed
steps.observed: Only one idle agent (CEO) present; Leads/Workers empty

evidence.network: GET /api/companies/{companyId}/dashboard (observed in browser request log); GET /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs -> 200

assertions.issues: Blocked by data shape: no active/running or waiting agents to validate ordering precedence.

assertions.title: Active agents expanded, idle agents collapsed

steps.action: Capture initial dashboard state and inspect block testids
steps.expected: Idle agent appears collapsed by default

steps.action: Click collapsed idle block and re-check state
steps.observed: State changed to data-testid agent-block-expanded; metadata rendered (role/adapter)

steps.action: Verify active agent expanded rendering with stream section
steps.expected: Active agent block with header + metadata + stream section
steps.observed: No active agents present in fixture

assertions.issues: Partially validated idle collapse/expand; blocked on missing active-agent fixture for full assertion.

assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Expand dashboard agent block and inspect transcript area
steps.expected: Reasoning/tool call/tool result/error lines with specified colors
steps.observed: Expanded block contains only metadata text (CEO role ceo adapter codex_local); no stream lines present

assertions.issues: Blocked by absence of transcript stream content in dashboard for current seeded data.

assertions.title: Agent list with monospace and square indicators

steps.action: Open /WEA/agents/all and inspect tier agent card
steps.expected: JetBrains Mono agent name (11-12px) and 6x6 square status indicator
steps.observed: Agent name CEO rendered in JetBrains Mono 11px; indicator rendered at 6x6 with border-radius 0 and idle border style

assertions.title: Filter tabs per design system

steps.action: Inspect tab labels and styles on /WEA/agents/all
steps.observed: Tabs are All/Active/Paused/Error; styling mostly matches (JetBrains Mono 11px, muted inactive, radius 0), but Idle tab is absent and replaced by Paused/Error

assertions.issues: Contract expects All/Active/Idle tab set; implementation exposes All/Active/Paused/Error.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` initially returned no entries during early checks.
frictions.resolution: Triggered explicit read-only fetches and re-ran `network requests`, then corroborated key endpoint statuses with curl.

blockers.description: Seeded UI data contained only one idle agent and no active/waiting/error dashboard transcript activity.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded dashboard/agents routes and toggled idle expansion; prerequisite data still absent.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-GUI-PRIM-001, VAL-GUI-AGENTS-001), 1 failed (VAL-GUI-AGENTS-002), 4 blocked by missing fixture coverage (VAL-GUI-FOUND-004, VAL-GUI-DASH-005/006/007).
